**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Tongrun Equipment Technology Co., Ltd. presents a profound structural anomaly typical of listed holding companies undergoing major asset restructuring. Despite being a 'Large' Sino-foreign joint venture and a publicly listed company with a massive registered capital of 363 million RMB, it reports only 4 insured employees in 2024 at its Changshu headquarters. This extreme capital-to-workforce disparity indicates that this specific corporate entity acts purely as an 'Asset Holding & Capital Operation Shell' for the Tongrun Group (Torin). The actual physical manufacturing of its legacy metal toolboxes and its newly acquired green energy portfolio (photovoltaics, transformers, energy storage) is undoubtedly executed by its numerous unlisted, wholly-owned operating subsidiaries. The company is actively pivoting from traditional sheet metal fabrication to the lucrative renewable energy sector via M&A or subsidiary injection.
